app.title: Storage System
app.description: Inventory app connected to an album-based photo source and JSON.
home.searchTitle: Search for something in the workshop
home.noResults: No matches yet. Add or update a session.
home.speechUnsupported: Speech output is not supported in this browser.
home.searchAnswerNone: I could not find a clear match for "{query}".
home.searchAnswerMultiple: I found {count} matches for "{query}". The clearest one seems to be {label} in {system}, {shelf}, {slot}.
home.overviewOverlayNote: Album cover from the selected photo source. Used as an overview image of the space.
search.label: Question or keyword
search.placeholder: For example: adapters, hole saw, network cable
search.voiceUnsupported: Voice search is not supported in this browser.
search.voiceCaptured: Voice captured. You can search now.
search.voiceError: Could not read your voice right now.
search.voiceHint: Press Microphone and say what you are looking for.
settings.title: Settings
settings.intro: Here you control appearance, typography, and which AI engine the app should use for image analysis.
settings.security.title: Security
settings.security.intro: Manage the API key that protects the public integration endpoints.
settings.security.publicApiKeyPlaceholde: Leave blank if the public API should not be protected
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.intro: Choose theme, font, language, and readability for the entire app.
settings.immich.title: Photo Source
settings.immich.intro: Choose photo source, account, access method, and which album the app should inventory from.
settings.immich.apiKeyPlaceholder: User key for reading and later writing metadata
settings.immich.photoPrismApiKeyPlacehol: API key, app password, or access token for a PhotoPrism album
settings.immich.shareKeyPlaceholder: Key from a shared Immich link
settings.immich.photoPrismHint: PhotoPrism uses token-based access here, so share key is not shown as an option.
settings.immich.albumPlaceholder: Choose album or load the list
settings.immich.albumIdPlaceholder: Paste album ID if you want
settings.ai.title: AI Engine
settings.ai.intro: Here you choose provider, endpoint, and model for image analysis.
settings.ai.apiKeyPlaceholder: Optional for LM Studio, required for cloud APIs
settings.ai.tipBody: OpenAI, Anthropic, OpenRouter, and Open WebUI use their own model lists. LM Studio loads models from your local server.
settings.printer.title: Printer
settings.printer.intro: Choose which already installed CUPS queue the app should use for label status and printing.
settings.printer.recommendation: Recommendation: prefer a DYMO queue here until we have full support for A4 label sheets on regular laser printers.
settings.printer.queuePlaceholder: Choose a printer queue or load the list
settings.backup.title: Backup
settings.backup.intro: Download a backup or export the catalog to Excel from the same place.
settings.backup.infoBody: The backup contains inventory, session history, analysis texts, label templates, and other app settings in a zip file. The Excel export gives a readable catalog with boxes, locations, summaries, and keywords.
settings.backup.importInfoBody: The import uses the app's current export format. It updates boxes and current sessions from the file, while keeping linked images in the inventory.
settings.prompts.title: Prompts
settings.prompts.intro: Here you can fine-tune how the model is instructed. This is especially useful when testing new models.
settings.prompts.resetConfirm: Reset all default prompts to the built-in code values?
settings.prompts.modelOverrideNote: Empty fields inherit the default prompts.
settings.prompts.boxAnalysis.help: Sent with all selected images during box analysis. Controls label, location, and content suggestions as well as the role assigned to each image.
settings.prompts.publicAsk.help: Used by /api/public/ask (e.g. Home Assistant) for text-based queries.
settings.prompts.voiceAsk.help: Used for voice queries on the home page. Produces more natural answers suited for text-to-speech.
settings.prompts.roleSystem.help: Used per image to determine its role (label, location, inside…) if the box analysis did not assign one.
settings.prompts.roleUser.help: The question sent per image to classify its role.
settings.prompts.anthropicSystem: Anthropic: system prompt for box analysis
settings.prompts.anthropicSystem.help: Used only when the AI engine is Anthropic. Replaces the dedicated system field in the API call.
settings.prompts.summarySystem.help: Fallback system prompt when no role-specific prompt is configured.
settings.prompts.summaryUser.help: Fallback prompt when no role-specific prompt is configured.
settings.prompts.perRoleIntro: These prompts are used when you analyze an individual photo in the box view. The correct prompt is selected automatically based on the photo's role.
settings.prompts.role.label: Label photo
settings.prompts.photoCleanup: Cleanup phrases: photo text (one per line)
font.arial.label: Arial
font.system.label: System UI
font.verdana.label: Verdana
font.trebuchet.label: Trebuchet
font.georgia.label: Georgia
locations.pageIntro: Choose a location unit to see its positions and open the right box directly.
locations.empty: No location unit has been found in the data yet.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: Check the box ID or go back to the overview.
locationView.intro: Click a box to open the box view. {rowType} and slot are shown according to the current placement in the system.
locationView.title: Positions in {title}
inbox.title: Images to connect
inbox.intro: Only new images that are not yet linked to any box are shown here. Mark the images that belong to the same box and let the app suggest an inventory session.
inbox.selectImageFirst: Select at least one image first.
inbox.manySelectedWarning: Many images selected. For best accuracy and faster results, 2 to 6 images per analysis is usually recommended.
inbox.empty: The inbox is empty right now. All images in the album are already linked, or we are waiting for the next import from the phone.
boxForm.pageTitle: New box or new inventory session
boxForm.analysisLoaded: Analysis suggestion loaded. Review the fields, adjust what is needed, and then save the session.
boxForm.summaryPlaceholder: Short description of what the box contains right now.
boxForm.notesPlaceholder: Optional notes about the box or the inventory.
boxForm.noAvailableImages: There are no free images left to select right now.
boxForm.markedImagesFollow: Marked album images will follow when you save the session, even if you do not first click `Add selected images`.
boxForm.duplicateOne: There is already a box with the same name at this location. Choose another letter or edit the existing box instead.
boxForm.duplicateMany: There are already boxes with the same name at this location. Choose another letter or edit an existing box instead.
boxForm.exactConflictOne: Warning: the location is already used by {label} ({boxId}). If you save as a new box, you must choose another letter or another location.
boxForm.exactConflictMany: Warning: the location is already used by {count} boxes. If you save as a new box, you must choose another letter or another location.
boxPage.noSavedSession: No session has been saved for this box yet.
boxPage.noImagesYet: No images linked to the current session yet.
boxPage.noSessionNotes: No extra notes for the current session.
boxPage.addMoreImages: Add more images to the current session
boxPage.addMoreImagesIntro: Choose among images in the selected album that are not yet linked to any box, assign an image role, and add them directly from here.
boxPage.noUnassignedImages: There are no unlinked images left to add right now.
boxPage.deleteIntro: This removes the box, all of its inventory sessions, and all linked image references from the app. The actual images remain in the photo source.
boxPage.deleteLocationNote: Locations are derived from the stored boxes, so an unused location disappears automatically when no box is left there.
boxPage.deleteConfirm: Delete this box and all of its sessions from the app? The linked images in the photo source will not be deleted.
boxPage.saveTextFailed: Could not save the analysis text.
boxPage.clearAnalysisFailed: Could not clear the image analysis.
labels.field.title: Name
labels.template.name: Template name
labels.template.moveHint: Move the blocks on the label and save when you are satisfied.
labels.template.saveFailed: Could not save the label templates.
labels.print.sentWithId: The label was sent to DYMO ({id}).
labels.print.sent: The label was sent to DYMO.
labels.preview.emptyDescription: Short description of the box contents.
labels.preview.emptyPlace:
Shelving unit: X
Shelf: X
Slot: XA
labels.printer.label: DYMO printer:
labels.printer.connectedUnknownSize: DYMO is connected but is not reporting a clear roll size right now.
labels.printer.slow: The printer responded too slowly right now. The page still works, and you can try again shortly.
labels.printer.selectedTemplate: Selected template based on printer roll: {name}.
labels.printer.appliedMedia: Using printer roll {media} in the selected template.
translations.title: Translations
translations.intro: Edit language files by section, search for keys, and save only the translations you want to change.
translations.newLanguageHint: The new language will be created with empty translations based on the Swedish keys.
translations.newLanguageOptionalFields: Only the language code is required. The rest will be filled automatically if you leave them empty.
translations.aiRecommendation: Prefer a model with strong multilingual quality and a consistent writing style. For UI translation, it matters that the model preserves placeholders like {count} and stays concise and consistent. OpenRouter is a good choice when you want to compare several models quickly.
translations.aiPromptHelp: This instruction controls how the model should behave when it creates translation drafts. Here you can clarify that placeholders like {count} must be preserved, that the tone should stay concise, and that technical values should not be translated unnecessarily.
translations.aiApiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to reuse the API key from the main AI engine when that fits.
translations.aiModelsFailed: Could not read the model list.
translations.aiModelTipsBody: Start with a strong general language model. Then test 5 to 10 real UI strings and compare tone, cost, speed, and how well placeholders and line breaks are preserved.
translations.aiNothingMissing: There are no missing strings to fill here.
translations.aiSameLanguage: AI draft requires different source and target languages.
translations.empty: No strings match the current filtering.
translations.aiHint: AI can now fill missing strings in the selected section. Review the draft and save when you are satisfied.
